name: Pediatric cardiac autologous mitochondrial transplantation after ischemia-reperfusion injury
summary: A single-center retrospective pediatric pilot comparing revascularization plus autologous mitochondrial transplantation with revascularization alone in postcardiotomy cardiogenic shock after ischemia-reperfusion injury.
population: Pediatric patients requiring postcardiotomy ECMO for severe refractory cardiogenic shock after ischemia-reperfusion injury between May 2002 and December 2018
